data_description.name: Name for your pool robot in Home Assistant
data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness. Can be toggled later via Configure.

select_device.title: Select Robot
select_device.description: Select which robot to add to Home Assistant.

data_description.device: Choose the robot you want to add
data_description.name: Optional: Override the default name for this robot

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate iAqualink Robot
reauth_confirm.description: Your iAquaLink credentials for {username} are no longer accepted. Enter the current password to resume the integration without losing entity history.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to iAquaLink service. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.no_devices: No robots found on your account. Please check that your robot is properly registered with iAquaLink.
error.device_not_found: Selected device could not be found. Please try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid iAquaLink credentials. Please check your username and password and try again.

abort.already_configured: This robot is already configured in Home Assistant.
abort.no_serial: No serial number was returned for this robot. The cloud account is reachable but the device list is empty or incomplete. Please try again later.
abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful. The integration has resumed.
abort.reauth_unavailable: Reauthentication is no longer available for this entry (it may have been deleted). Please delete and re-add the integration if needed.

init.title: iAqualink Robot Options
init.description: Adjust runtime behavior for this robot.

data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness.

remote_forward.name: Remote Forward
remote_forward.description: Send forward command to the robot for remote control (VR and VortraX robots only)

remote_backward.name: Remote Backward
remote_backward.description: Send backward command to the robot for remote control (VR and VortraX robots only)

remote_rotate_left.name: Remote Rotate Left
remote_rotate_left.description: Send rotate left command to the robot for remote control (VR and VortraX robots only)

remote_rotate_right.name: Remote Rotate Right
remote_rotate_right.description: Send rotate right command to the robot for remote control (VR and VortraX robots only)

remote_stop.name: Remote Stop
remote_stop.description: Send stop command to the robot for remote control (VR and VortraX robots only)

add_fifteen_minutes.name: Add 15 Minutes
add_fifteen_minutes.description: Add 15 minutes to the cleaning time (VR and VortraX robots only)

reduce_fifteen_minutes.name: Reduce 15 Minutes
reduce_fifteen_minutes.description: Reduce 15 minutes from the cleaning time (VR and VortraX robots only)
